description_long: This is a classic bed frame with a painted wood finish, featuring a high, arched headboard and a lower, matching footboard. Both the headboard and footboard are adorned with decorative paneling and subtle carved details, giving the bed an elegant, traditional appearance. The side rails and legs are sturdy, with turned posts at each corner, adding to the vintage charm. The bed's support system consists of evenly spaced wooden slats, designed to hold a mattress securely. The headboard and footboard both have a woven or perforated central panel, contributing to the bed's ornate look. The overall color is a soft, muted white or light gray, enhancing its refined and timeless style.
description: A classic, painted wood bed frame with an arched headboard, matching footboard, and decorative paneling. The frame features turned posts and slatted mattress support.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched headboard, decorative paneling, and slatted base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bed's length, slatted support, and the profile of both headboard and footboard.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the headboard and footboard, with visible paneling and turned posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slatted base and side profile of the frame.
